content.full_text:
October 2, 2003

Andy Birnbaum
Reich, Adell, Crost & Cvitan
3550 Wilshire Blvd., Suite 2000
Los Angeles, CA 90010

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-215

Dear Mr. Birnbaum:

This letter confirms the receipt of your September 16, 2003 correspondence, requesting advice on behalf of the Canyons Faculty Association Yes on Proposition 47 Account ("COC"), which was formed in support of a measure on the November 2002 ballot. However, we note that your question appears to concern a substantial amount of past conduct. Thus, we are unable to provide written advice (See § 83114; subd. (b); regulation 18329, subd. (b)(8)(A)&(C), copy enclosed).

I enclose some advice letters that this agency has previously given that may assist you with your question (Lacy Advice Letter, No. I-03-076; Parisi Advice Letter, No. A-02-112).

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

Enclosures
JWW:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\03-215
